gate0.source_grade_rationale: NDTV Profit is a primary financial news publication listed directly on the approved-source list; it is not a secondary aggregator.

entities.geography: India (TCS listing: NSE/BSE); United States (suit decided in US courts)

materiality_math: Base 72 (material relevance 0.93, direct primary issuer, $70M quantified exceptional charge, Supreme Court rejection is final) + novelty 13 (0.85 × 15) − penalties 0 (new_event, no prior match) + overrides 0 = 85/100
routing_reason: TCS will book a $70 million charge against Q1 FY27 earnings after losing its final legal appeal. This is the first time this event appears in the ledger, the outcome is definitive (no further appeals possible), and the charge is large enough to move reported earnings and shift analyst estimates.

sources.claim_supported: TCS to take $70M exceptional charge in Q1 FY27; US Supreme Court rejected TCS appeal in DXC suit
